data.title: Implement post-injection placement scan in apply-attribution-trailers.sh (SC-5)
data.description: After git interpret-trailers injection (T5b-impl), add post-injection scan in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. Scans commit-msg-file for pattern '^(Jira-Ticket|DSO-[A-Za-z-]+):' appearing before the final blank-line separator. Non-blocking: if any found mid-body, emit warning to stderr and continue (exit 0). AC: (1) all DSO-* at bottom -> no warning, exit 0; (2) DSO-* mid-body -> warning on stderr, exit 0; (3) all T5c-test tests pass; (4) validate.sh --ci passes.
